name: MicroAlgo Inc.
business: MicroAlgo Inc. develops and applies bespoke central processing algorithms integrated with software or hardware to provide comprehensive solutions to enterprise customers. The company serves customers in the internet advertisement, gaming, and intelligent chip industries by optimizing computing power, data processing, and algorithm efficiency.

exposures.sentence: The range of our services include algorithm optimization, accelerating computing power without the need for hardware upgrades, lightweight data processing, and data intelligence services.
Leveraging our central processing algorithm services, we have achieved accelerated computing in cloud computing applications, data lightweight efficiency enhancement, and traffic monetization.
Through the terminal-edge-cloud, an interconnected transportation system can efficiently perceive, analyze, predict and control regional traffic to ensure safety and efficiency.
Our intelligent chip industry customers depend on us to provide them with solutions for data processing and optimizing hardware.
For customers in the gaming industry, we provide a platform for distributing games augmented by cloud-based software and hardware optimization and acceleration.

We plan to expand the range of our central processing algorithms application for use in mobile internet, finance, government, manufacturing, and other industries where there is an increasing demand for data management and processing efficiency.
